title: Simplify renewable energy page text and add a biofuels process diagram

requirements.text: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Hydropower & Tidal page (frontend/src/pages/HydropowerTidalPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on the hydropower and tidal page... to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Hydropower & Tidal page reads at a lower high school level (simpler vocabulary, shorter sentences).
No headings (h1/h2/h3 titles) are changed.
The existing hydropower/tidal diagram component remains present and renders as before.

requirements.text: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Wind Energy page (frontend/src/pages/WindEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on... the wind energy page... to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Wind Energy page reads at a lower high school level.
No headings are changed.
The existing wind turbine diagram remains present and renders as before.

requirements.text: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Geothermal Energy page (frontend/src/pages/GeothermalEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on... the geothermal page... to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Geothermal Energy page reads at a lower high school level.
No headings are changed.
The existing geothermal diagram remains present and renders as before.

requirements.text: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Biomass Energy page (frontend/src/pages/BiomassEnergyPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on... the biomass page... to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Biomass Energy page reads at a lower high school level.
No headings are changed.
The existing biomass process diagram remains present and renders as before.

requirements.text: Rewrite/simplify all explanatory paragraphs on the Biofuels page (frontend/src/pages/BiofuelsPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level while preserving the original meaning and keeping all existing headings and section structure unchanged.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on... the biofuels page... to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Biofuels page reads at a lower high school level.
No headings are changed.
The Biofuels page still covers the same topics (what biofuels are, ethanol steps, biodiesel steps, and uses) with the same overall section structure.

requirements.text: Add a new Biofuels process diagram component (similar in style and structure to the existing SVG diagram components) and render it at the bottom of the Biofuels page content.

quotes: Also add a diagram of how the biofuel process works just like you did for all the other pages.

acceptanceCriteria: A new diagram component exists under frontend/src/components/diagrams/ (e.g., BiofuelsProcessDiagram.tsx) and uses the same overall styling pattern as the other diagrams (card-like wrapper, title, SVG with accessibility labels).
The Biofuels page renders the diagram at the bottom of the page (after the existing content sections), using the existing pattern: a `div` with `className="not-prose my-8"`.
The diagram includes accessible SVG labeling (role="img" and aria-labelledby with <title> and <desc>) similar to other diagrams.
The app builds successfully with the new component and import.

requirements.text: Simplify user-facing paragraph text on the Sources page (frontend/src/pages/SourcesPage.tsx) to a lower high school reading level without changing any source titles or URLs.

quotes: simplify the paragraphs that are on... the sources page to a lower high school level.

acceptanceCriteria: The main intro paragraph and the 'About These Sources' paragraph read at a lower high school level.
The per-source descriptions (the `description` fields) are simplified while preserving meaning.
All source titles and URLs remain exactly the same strings as before.
Page layout/components and link behavior remain unchanged.

constraints: Frontend files listed as immutable by the platform (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, and frontend/src/components/ui/*) must not be edited.
Do not change Sources page URLs or source titles; only simplify descriptive text.
Keep existing headings (h1/h2/h3 text) unchanged on the specified pages; only rewrite paragraph/description content.
No backend changes are required for these content/diagram updates (Motoko actor should remain untouched unless a strictly necessary bug is discovered).
nonGoals: Do not add new renewable energy topics or new routes/navigation items.
Do not change the overall page layouts, section ordering, or remove existing diagrams from other pages.
Do not implement any new backend storage, admin editing tools, or authentication changes.
